title: Colored Target Blocks
description: This mod adds colored target blocks, so you can focus more on your accuracy. ;)
body:
# Colored Target Blocks
This mod adds colored target blocks, so you can focus more on your accuracy. ;)

### What this mod adds
- Blocks
  - White Target
  - Light Tray target
  - Gray Target
  - Black Target
  - Brown Target
  - Red Target
  - Orange Target
  - Yellow Target
  - Lime Target
  - Green Target
  - Cyan Target
  - Light Tlue target
  - Blue Target
  - Purple Target
  - Magenta Target
  - Pink Target
